story_text: In 1995, Charlie Gibbs (PMLS) reported Sagittoidea, a species of arrow worms, which has not been seen since.
In 2010, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Bopyroides hippolytes, a species of arthropods, which has not been seen since.
In 1969, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Pugettia gracilis, a species of arthropods, which was later confirmed by Peter Luckham in 2013. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/2976672
In 2025, Dave "Zeuss" Cochrane reported Chionoecetes bairdi, a species of arthropods, as new for Galiano Island. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/270339038
In 1994, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Aplidium californicum, a species of chordates, which has not been seen since.

In 2001, Amy Rowley (BCCSN) reported Megaptera novaeangliae kuzira, a species of chordates, which was later confirmed by Andrew Simon in 2017. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/6532303
In 2025, Darcy Kehler reported Merluccius productus, a species of chordates, as new for Galiano Island. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/285811769
In 1993, Charlie Gibbs (PMLS) reported Beroe abyssicola, a species of comb jellies, which was later confirmed by catiemac in 2020. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/57175255
In 2016, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Kaburakia excelsa, a species of flatworms, which was later confirmed by Andrew Simon in 2019. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/24259233
In 1985, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Barentsia sp., a species of goblet worms, which has not been seen since.
In 2008, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Phoronis ijimai, a species of horseshoe worms, which was later confirmed by Karolle Wall in 2013. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/4014973
In 1995, Charlie Gibbs (PMLS) reported Discophyton rudyi, a species of jellyfish, corals & anemones, which has not been seen since.

In 1985, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Sertularella sp., a species of jellyfish, corals & anemones, which was later confirmed by Dave "Zeuss" Cochrane in 2023. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/182593081
In 2025, Shayne Poleyko reported Anthopleura xanthogrammica, a species of jellyfish, corals & anemones, as new for Galiano Island. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/279148263
In 1981, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Terebratalia transversa, a species of lamp shells, which has not been seen since.
In 1961, Macoma calcarea, a species of molluscs, was historically reported (RBCM, 976-01146-008), but it has not been seen since.
In 1969, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Dendronotus albus, a species of molluscs, which was later confirmed by Karin Fletcher in 2009. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/68751256
In 2006, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Bowerbankia sp., a species of moss animals, which has not been seen since.

In 1973, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Schizoporella japonica, a species of moss animals, which was later confirmed by Joan Septembre in 2019. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/24768697
In 2007, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Golfingia vulgaris, a species of peanut worms, which has not been seen since.
In 1996, Charlie Gibbs (PMLS) reported Tubulanus albocinctus, a species of ribbon worms, which has not been seen since.
In 2008, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Tubulanus ruber, a species of ribbon worms, which was later confirmed by Karolle Wall in 2017. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/7674347
In 2006, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Pentamera sp., a species of sea stars, urchins & kin, which has not been seen since.

In 1969, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Orthasterias koehleri, a species of sea stars, urchins & kin, which was later confirmed by Karolle Wall in 2013. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/3706322

In 2024, Dave "Zeuss" Cochrane reported Eupentacta pseudoquinquesemita, a species of sea stars, urchins & kin, as new for Galiano Island. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/207078125
In 1986, Crucigera zygophora, a species of segmented worms, was historically reported (RBCM), but it has not been seen since.

In 1969, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Dodecaceria pacifica, a species of segmented worms, which was later confirmed by Peter Luckham in 2016. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/2763488
In 2025, Andrew Simon reported Glycera sp., a species of segmented worms, as new for Galiano Island. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/281879259
In 1994, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Adocia sp., a species of sponges, which has not been seen since.
In 1985, Andy Lamb (PMLS) reported Leucilla nuttingi, a species of sponges, which was later confirmed by Peter Luckham in 2013. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/2975914
In 2024, Dave "Zeuss" Cochrane reported Cliona celata, a species of sponges, as new for Galiano Island. Observation: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/236228032
